title: Korak 3

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents: Planets
challengeFiles.seed: Planets

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: You should have three button elements inside of the tablist element.
Each of your button elements should have a role attribute set to "tab".
Your first button element should have the text 🌍 Earth.
Your second button element should have the text 🪐 Saturn.
Your third button element should have the text 🔴 Mars.

description:
Sledeći korak je dodavanje dugmadi koja će biti odgovorna za prebacivanje između različitih planeta i njihovih činjenica.

Unutar elementa tablist, dodajte tri button elementa, svaki sa atributom role postavljenim na "tab". Prvi button element treba da ima tekst 🌍 Earth. Drugi button treba da ima tekst 🪐 Saturn. Treći button element treba da ima tekst 🔴 Mars.
